# Q7 replace literal user= prefix (regex log extraction)

**Dataset**: `gx_09_logs` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Regex extraction from free-text log fields with regextract. Q7 replace literal user= prefix.

```sql
dataset = gx_09_logs | alter no_user_tok = replace(line, "user=", "") | fields line, no_user_tok
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 14). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
